PROP-baseauction-inv-001.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry into bid() while s_entered is true.
PROP-baseauction-inv-001.assertion: forall call bid(): s_entered == true at entry => revert ReentrantCall()

PROP-baseauction-inv-002.text: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut creates callback window; callback must not alter auction state.
PROP-baseauction-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt, data): state(auction) unchanged between safeTransfer(out) and safeTransferFrom(in)

PROP-baseauction-inv-003.text: Callback execution between asset transfer and assetOut pull must not enable double-spend or state manipulation.
PROP-baseauction-inv-003.assertion: forall bid with data.length>0: auctionCallback() cannot re-enter bid() or modify auctionStarts/balances

PROP-baseauction-pre-001.text: bid() must revert if no live auction exists for the asset (auctionStart==0 or expired).
PROP-baseauction-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): auctionStart==0 OR elapsed>duration => revert InvalidAuction()

PROP-baseauction-pre-002.text: bid() must revert if bidUsdValue is below minBidUsdValue threshold.
PROP-baseauction-pre-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): bidUsdValue < s_minBidUsdValue => revert BidValueTooLow()

PROP-baseauction-pre-003.text: bid() must revert if amount exceeds contract's available balance for the asset.
PROP-baseauction-pre-003.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): amt > availableBalance => revert BidAmountTooHigh()

PROP-baseauction-inv-004.text: priceMultiplier must decay linearly from startingPriceMultiplier to endingPriceMultiplier over auctionDuration.
PROP-baseauction-inv-004.assertion: multiplier = start - (start - end) * min(elapsed, duration) / duration; multiplier >= end

PROP-baseauction-inv-005.text: elapsedTime must be clamped to auctionDuration so multiplier never goes below endingPriceMultiplier.

PROP-baseauction-inv-006.text: Rounding in _getAssetOutAmount must favor the protocol (mulDivUp for USD, mulWadUp for multiplier).
PROP-baseauction-inv-006.assertion: assetOutAmount computed via mulDivUp and mulWadUp; bidder receives <= fair market value

PROP-baseauction-inv-007.text: No auction can be started for an asset that already has a live auction.

PROP-baseauction-inv-008.text: Asset out tokens received via performUpkeep must be forwarded to assetOutReceiver, not auctioned.
PROP-baseauction-inv-008.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset == assetOut => safeTransfer(asset, assetOutReceiver, balance)

PROP-baseauction-inv-009.text: Ended auctions must have been previously started (auctionStarts != 0) before _onAuctionEnd is called.

PROP-baseauction-inv-010.text: On auction end, remaining auctioned asset must be returned to feeAggregator and assetOut forwarded to receiver.
PROP-baseauction-inv-010.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd: assetBalance>0 => transfer(asset, feeAgg); outBalance>0 => transfer(out, receiver)

PROP-baseauction-inv-011.text: Auction ended condition must trigger when duration elapsed OR balance drops below minAuctionSizeUsd.

PROP-baseauction-inv-012.text: No new auctions started if assetOut price is invalid (stale or zero).

PROP-baseauction-asm-001.text: Only AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE can call performUpkeep; unauthorized callers must be rejected.

PROP-baseauction-inv-016.text: s_entered must be reset to false after bid() completes, even if callback reverts.
PROP-baseauction-inv-016.assertion: forall bid() completion: s_entered == false (unlock always executes)

PROP-baseauction-inv-017.text: safeTransferFrom must pull exactly assetOutAmount from bidder after asset transfer out.
PROP-baseauction-inv-017.assertion: forall bid: balanceOf(assetOut, contract) increases by exactly assetOutAmount after pull

PROP-baseauction-post-001.text: After bid() settles, contract must hold transferred assetOut and bidder must hold transferred asset.
PROP-baseauction-post-001.assertion: post bid: bidder.balance(asset) += amount AND contract.balance(assetOut) += assetOutAmount

PROP-baseauction-post-002.text: After performUpkeep starts auction, auctionStarts[asset] must equal block.timestamp.

PROP-baseauction-post-003.text: After _onAuctionEnd, auctionStarts[asset] must be deleted (set to 0).

PROP-baseauction-inv-019.text: getAssetOutAmount view must return 0 for invalid auctions instead of reverting.
PROP-baseauction-inv-019.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(view): auctionStart==0 OR expired => return 0 (no revert)

PROP-baseauction-inv-020.text: View function must clamp amount to available balance to prevent misleading output.

PROP-baseauction-inv-023.text: Bidder-controlled callback data must not enable state manipulation between transfer-out and pull-in.
PROP-baseauction-inv-023.assertion: forall bid with data: auctionCallback(data) executes in locked state (s_entered==true)

PROP-baseauction-inv-024.text: Dutch auction price curve must be monotonically non-increasing over time; no price increase after decay starts.
PROP-baseauction-inv-024.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: getAssetOutAmount(t2) <= getAssetOutAmount(t1) for same input

PROP-baseauction-pre-004.text: performUpkeep must only start auctions for assets with usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd.
PROP-baseauction-pre-004.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start, asset): balanceUsd(asset) < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert

PROP-baseauction-pre-005.text: performUpkeep must revert if asset params decimals are zero (not configured).

PROP-baseauction-asm-002.text: Bidders are untrusted; all bid parameters (asset, amount, data) must be fully validated before execution.
PROP-baseauction-asm-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): validate(auctionLive, bidValue, balance) before any transfer

PROP-baseauction-asm-003.text: CowSwap solvers are untrusted; GPV2CompatibleAuction.isValidSignature must validate order params fully.
PROP-baseauction-asm-003.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash, sig): validate order against current auction state and price

PROP-baseauction-inv-025.text: Concurrent bids draining balance must not cause later bids to transfer more than available balance.
PROP-baseauction-inv-025.assertion: forall bid: amount <= balanceOf(asset, contract) at time of transfer

PROP-baseauction-inv-026.text: Arbitrary deposits during live auctions must not cause assetOutAmount calculation to use inflated balance.
PROP-baseauction-inv-026.assertion: assetOutAmount depends on bid amount and price, not contract balance (except for cap check)

PROP-baseauction-inv-028.text: Only assets with configured params (decimals > 0) may be evaluated for auction eligibility.

PROP-baseauction-inv-029.text: performUpkeep must process feeAggregator.transferForSwap before iterating eligible assets to ensure balance.
PROP-baseauction-inv-029.assertion: transferForSwap() called before any auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp

PROP-baseauction-inv-030.text: Price computation must use 18-decimal fixed-point arithmetic consistently across all paths.
PROP-baseauction-inv-030.assertion: all price values scaled to 1e18 before arithmetic; no mixed-decimal operations

PROP-baseauction-inv-032.text: checkUpkeep and performUpkeep must agree: assets marked eligible by check must be processable by perform.
PROP-baseauction-inv-032.assertion: forall asset in checkUpkeep.eligible: performUpkeep(asset) does not revert due to state mismatch

PROP-baseauction-pre-007.text: Only assets with valid price can be eligible for auction start; stale/zero price disqualifies.

PROP-baseauction-inv-033.text: Callback revert must propagate and revert entire bid() to prevent partial settlement.
PROP-baseauction-inv-033.assertion: forall bid with callback: callback reverts => entire bid() reverts (no partial state)

PROP-baseauction-inv-034.text: safeTransferFrom failure (bidder lacks assetOut balance/approval) must revert entire bid().
PROP-baseauction-inv-034.assertion: forall bid: safeTransferFrom fails => entire bid() reverts atomically

PROP-baseauction-inv-035.text: Price multiplier computation must not overflow or underflow in fixed-point arithmetic.
PROP-baseauction-inv-035.assertion: no overflow in (start - end) * elapsed / duration; all operands within uint256 bounds

PROP-baseauction-inv-036.text: Price used in bid must be fetched with validation enabled (withValidation=true) to prevent zero/stale price.
PROP-baseauction-inv-036.assertion: forall bid: _getAssetPrice(asset, true) used; zero or stale => revert

PROP-baseauction-inv-039.text: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams price is stale AND feed configured.
PROP-baseauction-inv-039.assertion: price = streams.price if fresh; else dataFeed.price if configured AND more recent; else streams.price

PROP-baseauction-inv-040.text: All returned prices must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals regardless of source (streams or feed).
PROP-baseauction-inv-040.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice: returned price is in 1e18 units

PROP-baseauction-inv-041.text: Stale price data (beyond stalenessThreshold) must revert when validation enabled; prevents unfavorable trades.
PROP-baseauction-inv-041.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice(withValidation=true): updatedAt < now - threshold => revert StaleFeedData

PROP-baseauction-inv-042.text: Zero price must revert when validation enabled to prevent division by zero or free asset acquisition.

PROP-baseauction-inv-043.text: All dataStreamsFeedIds must be allowlisted before bulk verification to prevent processing rogue feeds.
PROP-baseauction-inv-043.assertion: forall transmit: feedIdToAsset[feedId]==0 => revert FeedNotAllowlisted before verifyBulk

PROP-baseauction-inv-044.text: transmit must validate price is non-zero after conversion; zero price stored would corrupt auction pricing.
PROP-baseauction-inv-044.assertion: forall transmit(report): usdPrice == 0 after scaling => revert ZeroFeedData()

PROP-baseauction-inv-045.text: transmit must reject stale reports (observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold).
PROP-baseauction-inv-045.assertion: forall transmit(report): obsTimestamp < now - staleness => revert StaleFeedData()

PROP-baseauction-inv-048.text: Most recent timestamp wins between streams and feed fallback; stale source never overrides fresh source.
PROP-baseauction-inv-048.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice: use dataFeed only if dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt

PROP-baseauction-inv-050.text: Declared unverifiedReports count must match verifiedReports count from verifierProxy for consistent iteration.
PROP-baseauction-inv-050.assertion: len(verifiedReports) == len(unverifiedReports); mismatch => index OOB or silent truncation
